title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.2 - Buy Time now removes Unplayable from cards in hand (with smart plurals). Encore power is now visible and stacks: play it twice to retain Vigor for 2 turns. Requires BaseLib.
